programs.title: Flashpoint
programs.desc: A routine protection job goes awry when an explosion in a hotel kitchen masks the kidnapping of the wife of the man the team is guarding.

programs.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programs.desc: A suitcase filled with unidentified human remains unlocks a missing person's case that has gone unsolved for years; the forensic analysis of a nearly-destroyed cellphone found in the suitcase reveals a mysterious selfie.

programs.title: Chicago Fire
programs.desc: Kidd, Seager and Carver investigate a fire at the city stables; Kylie clashes with some of the firefighters over changes due to budget cuts; Herrmann struggles to keep it together as Cindy's condition worsens.

programs.title: Chicago Fire
programs.desc: Cruz feels the burden of his increased responsibilities; Kidd, Gallo and Carver get caught in the middle of a gang war on a call; Herrmann wrangles Trudy for help lifting Cindy's mood.

programs.title: Chicago Fire
programs.desc: Mouch builds a classic fire truck model for the Deputy District Chief but needs assistance from Gallo and Ritter; Brett and Violet encounter multiple victims with a strange set of symptoms; Cindy's chemotherapy results loom over the Herrmann family.

programs.title: Chicago Fire
programs.desc: A familiar face returns to Firehouse 51 to serve with Kidd on a special task force; with Tony close to breaking the CFD's perfect attendance record, Mouch and Capp work to keep him safe; old grudges resurface when Gallo reunites with a family member.
